title: ferray-random: all distributions return 1D arrays only — no shape parameter for ND output
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's Generator methods accept size as a tuple: rng.normal(0, 1, size=(3, 4, 5)) returns a 3x4x5 array. ferray-random's methods all take size: usize and return Array<f64, Ix1>. There's no way to generate a 2D or ND random array directly — users must generate flat and reshape. This is the single biggest ergonomic gap vs NumPy's random module. Change size to accept either usize (for 1D) or &[usize] (for ND), and return IxDyn.
